overview.description: AI-powered EHR and practice management platform for mental health therapists
overview.description_long: Upheal is an all-in-one practice management platform built for mental health clinicians. It combines AI-generated progress notes (from session transcription), telehealth video calling, scheduling, billing/payments, treatment planning, and analytics. The platform serves individual therapists, group practices, and virtual mental health providers with HIPAA-compliant tooling. Trusted by 70,000+ mental health providers globally.
overview.tagline: Mental Health EHR with AI Notes — Designed for clinicians. Built by clinicians. Powered by AI.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2021 by Juraj Chrappa (CEO) and Martin Horvath (CTO) with development team based in Prague. Incorporated as Upheal, Inc. in the US.

key_milestones.event: Launched UphealOS — full EHR replacement for private-pay practices
Reached 70,000+ mental health providers on platform

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core AI (session transcription + clinical note generation) is becoming commoditized by general-purpose LLMs. However, Upheal has meaningful moat in HIPAA compliance infrastructure, clinical-specific note formats (SOAP, DAP, GIRP, BIRP, EMDR), EHR integration, and insurance compliance checking — all requiring deep domain expertise to replicate.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Mental health documentation burden is a well-documented and growing problem with large addressable market. 70,000+ paying/free providers demonstrates clear product-market fit and adoption.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Only a $2M seed round (2022) is publicly confirmed with no evidence of follow-on funding. However, 70,000+ users and freemium-to-paid conversion model suggest real revenue. Bootstrapped growth is plausible but runway remains uncertain.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong PMF and domain-specific moat in healthcare compliance reduce displacement risk, but commoditization of AI note-taking (many competitors: Mentalyc, Blueprint, Autonotes, Heidi) and limited known funding create medium overall risk. Prague engineering team with US market focus is a good cost structure for sustainability.

metadata.notes: No CNAIP URL available. Company is US-incorporated (Upheal, Inc., Miami FL) with Prague CZ engineering office. Seed round amount ($2M) inferred from tech.eu URL slug 'upheal-raises-2m-seed-round' — not verified from article body. Czech/Slovak founders (Juraj Chrappa, Martin Horvath) with Prague dev team qualifies as Prague AI company.
